master.title: My promo codes
master.subtitle: Clients enter the code at booking to get a discount
master.empty: No promo codes yet — create your first one
master.infoBox: Clients enter the code when booking through the app. The discount applies to the service price. Each promo code is tied to you — the client must provide both the code and your name as the master.

owner.title: Promotions & promo codes
owner.subtitle: Each master manages their own promo codes independently

validate.title: Validate a promo code
validate.subtitle: Make sure the promo code is active before applying a discount manually

owner.infoBox: Masters create promo codes in the "Promotions" section of their own account. The client enters the code during online booking — the discount is applied automatically.
